name: Chicken Velvet Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter or margarine over medium heat.
2. Gradually add flour and stir until smooth.
3. Add milk, light cream, and chicken broth, stirring constantly.
4. Continue cooking over medium heat until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and stir in finely chopped cooked chicken and dash of pepper.
6. Return soup to boiling point and serve immediately.
7. Makes about 5 cups of soup.
